mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_salary_item (salary_slip_id, item_type, item_name, amount, remark, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{salarySlipId}, #{itemType}, #{itemName}, #{amount}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_salary_item SET item_type = #{itemType}, item_name = #{itemName}, amount = #{amount}, remark = #{remark}, modifier = #{modifier} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_salary_item SET amount = #{amount}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM tb_salary_item WHERE salary_slip_id = #{salarySlipId} AND item_type = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM tb_salary_item WHERE salary_slip_id = #{salarySlipId} AND item_type = 2
